creator: chuck@thesouthernlibertarian.com
text:
That patch still leaves a bad Makefile in place. One that does not add 
the proper threaded library when OpenEXR is built with clang, since 
clang does not, and will never, support the -dumpspecs parameter. Also, 
using `` in a Makefile is poor form.

This patch does both. Upgrades OpenEXR to 1.7, AND fixes the problem in 
the Makefile so it can be properly built with clang.

Chuck Burns
